headline: Assessing Hormel Foods (HRL) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price And Return Weakness
summary: Why Hormel Foods is on investors’ radar today Hormel Foods (HRL) is drawing investor attention after a period where the stock has delivered negative total returns over the past year and past 3 months, prompting fresh questions about valuation and earnings power. See our latest analysis for Hormel Foods. At a share price of $21.55, Hormel Foods has seen a 1-month share price return of 6.5% decline and a year-to-date share price return of 7.9% decline.
